ksa_text: Define the enterprise AI acceptable use policy, prohibited use categories, and human oversight requirements for AI-assisted decision making.

dcwf.top_element_label: Collaborate with customer to define information requirements.

nice.top_element_label: Knowledge of appropriate use policies and procedures

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA AG-T-004 (AI Governance/Task) excluded as out_of_scope (composite 0.462, highest: NIST AI RMF at 0.462). Domain prior: out. Core hits: 0. OOS hits: 0. Seniority: appropriate. Data asset valuation analysis: data ROI measurement, value quantification frameworks, infonomics application, and data quality-value correlation analysis.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No inconsistency. Exclude consistent with out_of_scope classification, composite 0.462, and AI Governance (AG) handling.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Does market evidence challenge the exclusion of this AI Governance KSA for Data Valuation Analyst?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: AI Governance competencies do not appear as Data Valuation Analyst requirements in job postings. They are allocated to specialist roles. Exclusion consistent with market patterns.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Exclusion upheld by market evidence. AI Governance is not a Data Valuation Analyst core competency. Final decision: exclude.
